recap: Deleted ctrl-t/h/j keybindings, vfh alias, vim-fzf-project-files, vim-fzf-git-file-history, and legacy fzf-git-commits + fzf-fs-directories-common autoloads.
Created scripts/bin/fzf/ctrl-r + helpers/options.zsh; updated ctrl-r.zsh keybinding to call the new script; deleted fzf-history, fzf-history-source, fzf-history-options legacy autoloads.
Created scripts/bin/fzf/ctrl-b; updated ctrl-b.zsh keybinding to use $OROSHI_ROOT path; deleted fzf-commands, fzf-commands-source, fzf-commands-options legacy autoloads.

notes: Also requires color system refactor (COLOR_ALIAS_* → ZSH assoc array) to be merged into main first

recap: Created scripts/bin/fzf/apt-packages (--source/--installed/--postprocess/--options) and scripts/bin/apt-packages-cache-generate; updated apt-install, apt-search, apt-uninstall callers; deleted all packages/apt legacy autoloads.
Created scripts/bin/fzf/docker-images (--source/--postprocess/--options); updated docker-image-pull to call new script; deleted all fzf/docker/images/remote/ legacy autoloads.
Created helpers/fs.zsh (fs-list-files), helpers/prompt.zsh (prompt-directory), and ctrl-shift-p script; updated ctrl-shift-p.zsh keybinding; deleted all fs/files/subdir/ legacy autoloads.
Created __lib/fzf-source-dirs.zsh helper and ctrl-shift-o script; updated ctrl-shift-o.zsh keybinding to call new script; deleted all fs/directories/subdir/ legacy autoloads.

Created scripts/bin/fzf/ctrl-o (git-root directory search) and __lib/git.zsh (fzf-git-root helper); fixed __lib/fzf-source-directories.zsh to exclude .git; updated ctrl-o.zsh keybinding; deleted fzf-fs-directories-project/* and fzf-fs-directories-plans/* legacy autoloads.
Created scripts/bin/fzf/fzf-plans (plan directory picker using plan-list-raw); added CTRL_O_PICKERS registry to ctrl-o.zsh with ralph/raplh → fzf-plans dispatch.
